case_title: LINH MONG TRUONG VS. KISHA MARIE WHITTENBERG

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS AND FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200010735)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRUONG, LINH MONG AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTENBERG, KISHA MARIE LYFT, INC. REICHBORN-MITCHELL, NICHOLAS TANNER DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-22-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-30-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-03-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
